name: /plugin-install rejects registration when one of the plugin's namespaced rule ids collides with a previously registered rule id from another plugin
command:
mkdir -p stub-clones/acme/clash && printf 'name: clash
rules:
  - id: foo
    detector: rubric/detectors/foo.sh
' > stub-clones/acme/clash/plugin.yaml && mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/plugins/registered/clash && printf 'foo
' > .claude-tdd-pro/plugins/registered/clash/rules.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/plugin-install.sh" acme/clash --gh-clone-stub stub-clones --rule-tester-stub pass 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'rule_id_collision' err.txt && grep -q 'clash/foo' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
